channel.title: Distributed-Tracing on Abdulkadir Güngör
channel.description: Recent content in Distributed-Tracing on Abdulkadir Güngör

item.title: Observability: System Health via Logging, Metrics, and Tracing
item.description: The complexity of microservice architectures and cloud computing ecosystems has made it impossible to monitor systems merely by checking if they are “up” or “down.” Traditional monitoring focuses on the external outputs of a system; Observability, however, is the ability to understand the internal state of a system through the data it produces (telemetry). For a system to be observable, it must rely on three pillars: Logs, Metrics, and Tracing.
